note: FDF annotation regression tests for subtype-factory dispatch and representative dictionary property round-trips.
FDF document-core regression tests for dictionary round-trips plus fixture-backed load/save smoke paths.
FDF field/page/template regression tests for hierarchy, options/actions, icon-fit, and template/page wiring round-trips.
Fixup regression tests for catalog fixup dispatch, default-resource repair, and orphan-widget rebuilding/generation paths.
43 native tests covering PDShading hierarchy: factory routing, all dictionary accessor round-trips, function wiring, EvalFunction clamping, PDResources shading lookup, and COSName constants.
24 deterministic fixture tests: UPM scaling, CIDToGIDMap identity/stream, TTF width fallback, ToUnicode cmap fallback, Type0/CIDFontType2 integration (issue #50).
Issue #51 regression tests covering Type0/CIDFontType0 CMap CID mapping, composite ToUnicode fallback path, Identity-H fallback behavior, and PDFontFactory descendant dispatch.

Fixture-backed regression tests for XmpBox parser/schema/type flows (issues #81/#90): roundtrip determinism; xpacket and schema extraction assertions; lenient parsing checks; serializer roundtrip schema-count checks; and helper coverage for DomHelper plus PdfaExtensionHelper namespace/mapping behavior.
Added deterministic XmpBox tests for primitive/simple properties, array properties, structured type instantiation, and ISO8601 date round-trips.

EncodedFont interface ported.
Base font interface ported with C# interface semantics.
CID-keyed CFF font model.
CFF charset interface.
Type1 CFF charset implementation.
CFF encoding interface.
CFF font base model.

Focused adapted port covering core CFF structure parsing. Charstring parser infrastructure (CFFOperator, CharStringCommand, Type1/Type2CharStringParser, DataInput*) and CID-keyed font support (CFFCharsetCID, FDSelect, CIDKeyedType2CharString) not yet ported. See issue #8.
CFF standard encoding singleton.
CFF standard string table (SID 0-390).
CFF-backed Type1 font model.
Type1 charstring path/width model. Full charstring interpreter pending (issue #8).
Type2 charstring path/width model. Full charstring interpreter pending (issue #8).
BuiltInEncoding now seeds custom embedded font code/name mappings through the shared encoding base class.
Base FontBox encoding map now ported with code/name lookup parity and read-only code-to-name exposure.
MacRoman encoding table ported with singleton access and representative lookup parity.
Adobe Standard Encoding table ported with singleton access and representative lookup parity.
PFB (Printer Font Binary) segment parser ported.
OTF-specific header data (ROS supplement).
TTF head table (global font metadata).
TTF maxp table (glyph count and memory limits).
In-memory TTF byte-array data stream. Corresponds to the Java MemoryTTFDataStream/RandomAccessReadDataStream.
Single name record in the naming table.
TTF name table with platform/language record lookup.
OTF parser extending TTFParser with OTTO sfnt-version support.
OpenType font model extending TrueTypeFont.
Abstract TTF data stream with typed read methods.
TTF parser covering sfnt header and table directory. Only head/maxp/name tables created; cmap/glyf/hmtx/loca and others pending (issue #9).
Base TTF table with tag, checksum, offset, length and lazy load.
GetWidth(string name) now scales by 1000/unitsPerEm. Core TTF parsing and metrics aligned. Vertical, GSUB advanced paths deferred.
Exception type for damaged/corrupt Type1 fonts.
Lexer token type for Type1 parser.
Interface for reading Type1 charstrings.
Type1 font model with PFB segment loading and property access.
Type1 PostScript lexer for token stream parsing.
Type1 font parser consuming lexer token stream.
Font bounding box model.
Interface for finding font directories on the host OS.
Font file discovery coordinator using OS-specific FontDirFinder.
macOS font directory locations.
Abstract base for native OS font dir finders.
IBM OS/400 font directory locations.
Unix/Linux font directory locations.
Windows font directory locations.
Upstream EncodingTest converted to xUnit with extra BuiltInEncoding fallback/read-only map assertions.
Expanded parity support with ArraySegment<byte> constructor for ByteBuffer-limit semantics used by upstream PDFBOX-5764 coverage.
LRU-cached file-backed RandomAccessRead; Java ByteBuffer/FileChannel adapted to FileStream+byte-array page cache.
Memory-mapped file RandomAccessRead using System.IO.MemoryMappedFiles; handles empty-file edge case absent from Java due to platform differences.
Mechanical parity port for the next low-fanout io write-capable buffer implementation.
File-backed page-handler implementing RandomAccessStreamCache; replaces in-memory-only StreamCache when useTempFile=true in MemoryUsageSetting.
Page-based RandomAccess implementation backed by ScratchFile.
Mechanically ported from upstream JUnit to xUnit v3 with expanded parity including deterministic local fixture for PDFBOX-5111 and ByteBuffer-limit semantics test PDFBOX-5764.
xUnit v3 port of upstream JUnit tests; test resources generated inline as temp files rather than embedded classpath resources.
xUnit v3 port of upstream JUnit tests; test resources generated inline as temp files rather than embedded classpath resources.
Mechanically ported from upstream JUnit to xUnit v3 using production RandomAccessReadBuffer.
Mechanical xUnit v3 test parity for RandomAccessReadWriteBuffer close, clear, paging, and EOF behavior.
Added AES key-length enum used by encryption layer port scaffolding.
Removed replaced PDLineDashPattern/PDSoftMask/PDFormXObject/PDTransparencyGroup stubs after real implementations landed.
Focused test coverage for COS containers/streams plus visitor completeness and serialization roundtrip interactions.
Focused tests validate document/update-state propagation and COSIncrement collection for updated direct and indirect children.
Focused xUnit coverage for new COS leaf primitives and interfaces.
Native test added for issue #29: fixture-driven COS regression scenarios for deterministic minimal/roundtrip parsing and malformed-input parser stability.
Focused xUnit coverage for COSStandardOutputStream position and line ending behavior.
Native test added for issue #28: visitor dispatch across all COS types, mixed object graph traversal, ICOSVisitor serialization path through COSWriter, and deterministic output fixtures.
Extended content-stream engine tests with form XObject traversal through Do operator.
Issue-47 regression fixture and closeout tests for tagged read path, artifact subtype dispatch, attribute-owner dispatch, and helper types.
Regression coverage for PNG/GIF/unknown file-signature detection and stream-position reset behavior.
Deterministic minimal tagged PDF fixture for end-to-end structure-tree and parent-tree regression coverage.

Fixture-driven theory coverage for full PDDocument.Load pipeline: classic xref, flate-content, xref-stream, and object-stream paths. Verifies page count, title, and author across all parser-integrated fixture types.

Fixture-driven theory coverage for full PDDocument.Load pipeline: classic xref, flate-content, xref-stream, and object-stream paths. Verifies page count, title, and author across all parser-integrated fixture types.

conversion_notes: Expanded operator processor tests to cover state, path, painting, clipping, color, inline-image hooks, type3, compatibility, and multi-operator scenario.

note: Roundtrip smoke checks for all parser-integrated paths: load fixture → save to MemoryStream → reload → assert page count, title, and author are preserved. Closes issue #41 regression and roundtrip scope.

Roundtrip smoke checks for all parser-integrated paths: load fixture → save to MemoryStream → reload → assert page count, title, and author are preserved. Closes issue #41 regression and roundtrip scope.
Added ExtGState accessor/copy behavior coverage for alpha, blend mode, line join, and dash pattern.
Regression coverage for parser bootstrap header/startxref behavior on fixture and malformed inputs.
Regression coverage for parser bootstrap header/startxref behavior on fixture and malformed inputs.
Regression coverage for xref-stream/object-stream resolution and parsed COSDocument/trailer integration.
Regression coverage for xref-stream/object-stream resolution and parsed COSDocument/trailer integration.
Regression coverage for classic xref-table trailer resolution, cyclic /Prev guard behavior, malformed xref subsection/entry rejection, and parsed COSDocument/trailer wiring.
Regression coverage for classic xref-table trailer resolution, cyclic /Prev guard behavior, malformed xref subsection/entry rejection, and parsed COSDocument/trailer wiring.
Added PDImageXObject simple Flate DeviceRGB decode fixture coverage.
Added PDStream Flate encode/decode roundtrip coverage.

Focused parser/writer roundtrip tests validate deterministic object parse/serialize flow on representative small fixtures, including an adapted COSWriterTest testPDFBox4321 check that writer usage does not close caller-managed output streams.
Native xUnit tests covering PageLayout and PageMode roundtrip, language, and null-clear semantics for new catalog methods.
Native xUnit tests covering all PDRectangle constructors, coordinate accessors, contains, retranslation, immutability guard, and standard-size constants.
Expanded focused xUnit coverage for schema creation/lookup registration and deterministic schema roundtrip serialization/parsing.
PDF byte-array, file-path, and RandomAccessRead entry points are implemented for both PDF and FDF loading; XFDF and public-key overloads remain deferred.
Added active resource tracking and form XObject content traversal.
Aligned Do operator mapping to upstream graphics package and preserved XObject dispatch behavior in stream processing.

COS array container now tracks update state and direct-child incremental-save semantics in addition to typed accessors and serialization behavior.
Foundational base type for all COS entities, including direct/indirect metadata.
Boolean primitive singleton values and PDF serialization tokens.
COS dictionary container now tracks update state, child origin propagation, and incremental-save collection behavior alongside typed accessors and serialization.
Top-level COS document container; mechanical port with full object-table/xref mapping plus parser bridge access to the canonical object pool for parser-to-COSDocument integration.
COSDocumentState ported as the document parsing/update gate used by COS update tracking.
Float primitive with malformed lexical fallback cases from upstream PDFBOX fixes.
COSIncrement ported for collecting updated top-level COS objects from direct and indirect child mutations.
Mechanical port of COS filtered-stream input wrapper; no Java-only APIs requiring adaptation.
Integer primitive with static cache window and invalid sentinel support.
COS name primitive/container key type now ported with visitor and serialization support.
Null primitive singleton representation.
Abstract numeric primitive and lexical numeric factory used by parser slices.
COS indirect object wrapper now includes dereferenced/update-state tracking; parser-backed lazy dereference remains deferred to the parser/document chunk.
Indirect object reference key type for COS graph identity.
Mechanical port of COS filtered-stream output wrapper; no Java-only APIs requiring adaptation.
COSStream now includes filter list resolution, decoded stream/view pathways, and lifecycle parity for filtered/unfiltered output semantics.
COS string primitive now ported with text/hex behavior and visitor support.
COSUpdateInfo contract ported with C# extension-method helpers for update-state and increment access.
COSUpdateState ported with recursive origin propagation for dictionaries, arrays, and dereferenced COSObject wrappers.
Mechanical port of COS parser interface; direct interface mapping with no Java-only dependencies.
Visitor coverage now includes primitive, container, name/string, object, and stream COS foundation types.
Updated to full table-driven upstream PDFDocEncoding mapping parity.
Read-only mutation guards now enforce behavior through virtual overrides, matching Java polymorphic dispatch expectations.
ASCII85 decode/encode implemented including z-shorthand handling.
ASCIIHex decode/encode implemented.
Placeholder only; decode/encode throw NotSupportedException.
Crypt filter supports only /Identity until encryption module is ported.
Placeholder only; decode/encode throw NotSupportedException.
FilterFactory resolves standard filter names and abbreviations.
Flate filter implemented with zlib/deflate fallback and predictor post-processing.
Identity passthrough filter implemented.
Placeholder only; decode/encode throw NotSupportedException.
Placeholder only; decode/encode throw NotSupportedException.
LZW decode/encode implemented with clear-table and EOD handling.
Predictor decode helper implemented for Flate/LZW.
RunLength decode/encode implemented.
WrapInSaveRestore, ImportPageAsForm, AppendFormAsLayer, ImportOcProperties ported. Uses PDPageContentStream for marked-content layer writing.
Full foreground/background overlay with per-page/first/last/odd/even/all-pages overlay support. Java method overlay() renamed Process() to avoid C# member-name-equals-type-name restriction.
Thin wrapper around Splitter. Constructor overloads and StartPage/EndPage properties faithfully ported.
Core page-by-page split using PDFCloneUtility. Structure-tree and annotation fixup omitted (not yet supported by the C# COS layer).
Low-level parser subset ported for token/object flow (comments, names, strings, arrays, dictionaries, booleans, null, numbers); broader parser orchestration remains out of chunk-2 scope.
Dedicated parser scaffold implemented for PDF header validation and startxref lookup from file tail.

Parser consumes dedicated bootstrap state, prevents cyclic /Prev recursion, enforces strict xref entry-state parsing, and now returns a populated COSDocument with canonical object-pool-backed trailer/object-stream resolution.
First pdfwriter slice: output stream wrapper with position tracking and newline-format helper methods.
COSWriter now implements ICOSVisitor; Write(COSBase?) routes through visitor dispatch. VisitFromDocument is a no-op for low-level serializer scope.

Open/load/save lifecycle now integrates parser-produced COSDocument for trailer/xref/object graph loading, removes legacy raw-trailer fallback, and ties PDDocument disposal to COSDocument lifetime; broader feature parity remains deferred.
Expanded with AcroForm, StructTreeRoot, and MarkInfo accessors for documentinterchange logical-structure integration; other high-fanout catalog features remain deferred.
String-based metadata, date (CreationDate/ModDate) and trapped fields all ported; full upstream Java Calendar->DateTimeOffset parity tested.
Expanded with /Annots list parsing and typed annotation wrappers; broader PDPage parity remains deferred.
Expanded with GetInheritableAttribute static method and bad-PDF repair (Page-instead-of-Pages root); multi-level deep-tree traversal deferred.
Added ExtGState and typed XObject lookup helpers for gs/Do processing.
PageLayout enum and string-value helpers ported one-to-one.
PageMode enum and string-value helpers ported one-to-one.
Adapted COSArray-backed collection port using Collection<T> to preserve PD/COS synchronization semantics.
Dictionary-backed map synchronization and primitive conversion helpers are covered by COSDictionaryTest.
Low-dependency COS interface needed by COSBase and higher PD model layers.
Mechanical marker interface port for destination/action union types.
Mechanical wrapper for COS dictionaries used by higher PD model types.
Standalone immutable rectangle type now mirrors upstream and is covered by TestPDRectangle.
Implemented metadata stream wrapper with XMP import/export helpers.
Adapted generic name-tree node port with sorted dictionary and null-safe traversal semantics.
Adapted number-tree node port using Activator-based value construction in place of Java reflection.
Object-stream wrapper metadata accessors and Extends linkage are covered by PDStreamTest.
Mechanical page label range dictionary wrapper port.
Adapted page label dictionary port with Roman/letter label generation and catalog integration.
Adapted test coverage for page label generation and catalog roundtrip behavior.
Mechanical PDModel common range port.
Core PDRectangle port with standard-size constants, coordinate accessors, contains/clip, retranslation, and immutable-rectangle guard; GeneralPath/Matrix transform methods deferred.
Implemented filter-aware PDStream wrappers for encode/decode and metadata access.
Mechanical typed dictionary wrapper port.
Mechanical complex file specification port including embedded-file dictionary accessors.
Adapted embedded-file stream port using DateTimeOffset-backed embedded date helpers.
Mechanical abstract file specification factory port.
Mechanical string-backed file specification port.
Adapted abstract PDF function base with factory and range/domain helpers.
Adapted sampled function port using a custom bit reader instead of Java ImageInputStream.
Mechanical exponential interpolation function port.
Mechanical stitching function port.
Mechanical PostScript calculator function port over the new type4 helper stack.
Adapted identity function port with safe null-base handling.
Mechanical Type 4 arithmetic operators port.
Mechanical Type 4 bitwise/logical operators port.
Mechanical Type 4 conditional operators port.
Adapted Type 4 execution context using a list-backed execution stack for Stack API parity.
Mechanical Type 4 instruction-sequence executor port.
Mechanical Type 4 instruction-sequence builder port with invariant-culture numeric parsing.
Mechanical Type 4 operator interface port.
Mechanical Type 4 operator registry port.
Mechanical Type 4 tokenizer/parser port.
Mechanical Type 4 relational operators port.
Adapted Type 4 stack operators port using list rotation helpers for .NET.
Abstract base with Create factory now dispatches UserProperties, Layout, List, Table, PrintField, and export-format owners; unknown owners fall back to PDDefaultAttributeObject.
Generic attribute dictionary wrapper exposing raw name/value access and change notification.
MarkInfo dictionary wrapper for tagged-PDF document metadata (Marked/UserProperties/Suspects).
Parent-tree value wrapper for dictionary or MCID-indexed array parent tree entries.

Attribute CRUD (GetAttributes, SetAttributes, AddAttribute, RemoveAttribute, AttributeChanged) added in issue #45. Class-name, marked-content, and parent traversal helpers already present from issue #43.
Core structure-node dictionary wiring, kid traversal/mutation, and marked/object-reference kid parsing are implemented for current tagged-PDF read-path parity target.
Issue #46: Typed number-tree node for the ParentTree entry. Handles both single structure-element dictionaries and arrays of structure element dictionaries via GetStructureElements(int).
Issue #46: GetParentTree/SetParentTree/GetParentTreeEntries parent-tree accessors added. ClassMap added in issue #45. Role-map, K entry, and parent-tree next-key from issue #43.
User-properties attribute object (O=UserProperties) with list-based add/remove/set for PDUserProperty entries.
Single user-property dictionary wrapper (N/V/F/H entries) with change notification back to parent PDUserAttributeObject.
Mechanical port of logical-structure revision pairing container used for revision-tracked structure metadata.
Marked-content model now includes Artifact subtype dispatch via PDMarkedContent.Create while preserving MCID/language/alternate/expanded text accessors and hierarchical content capture.
Marked-content property-list dictionary wrapper with create helper.
Prepress box-style dictionary with guideline color/width/style and line-dash accessors.
Artifact marked-content specialization (type, bbox, attached edges, subtype).
Export-format attribute object owners and list-numbering accessors.
Four-edge color wrapper used by tagged-PDF standard attributes.
Issue #46: Layout attribute object (O=Layout) with typed accessors for core layout properties.
Issue #46: List attribute object (O=List) with typed ListNumbering accessor.
PrintField attribute object with role, checked state, and alternate-name accessors.
Mechanical port of PDStandardAttributeObject; placed in LogicalStructure namespace where its subclasses reside.
Issue #46: Table attribute object (O=Table) with typed accessors for RowSpan, ColSpan, Headers, Scope, Summary, Short.
Standard tagged-PDF structure-type constants inventory.
Ported access permission bitfield model and flag mutators for standard/public-key permission bytes.
Added base decryption material abstraction.
Added hash algorithm factory helpers (MD5/SHA1/SHA256).
Added crypt filter dictionary wrapper and EncryptMetadata flag handling.
Ported encryption dictionary accessor model for key entries, permissions, and crypt filter wiring.
Added protection policy key length and AES preference configuration.
Added abstract security handler base state and contract for encryption/decryption preparation.
Added password-holding decryption material type.
Added standard password-based protection policy wrapper.
Class shell and constructors are ported; full standard security algorithm flow is deferred.

Mechanical port of CIDSystemInfo data class for FontMapper API.
Added cross-platform file system font discovery provider with stable ordered enumeration and subset-prefix normalization.
Added font mapper interface.
Added default font provider wrapper with injectable file-system lookup for deterministic tests.
Added lazy global font mapper singleton wiring.
Issue #51: added CIDSystemInfo access for descendant CJK/UCS2 integration heuristics in PDType0Font.
Issue #51: CIDFontType0 descendant behavior validated for Type0 CMap CID resolution and inherited width handling.
CIDToGIDMap support (Identity and stream), CodeToGID method, TTF advance-width fallback in GetWidth, ToUnicodeFallback via reverse cmap. Vertical metrics deferred.
Adapted stub – PDCIDFontType2 embedding deferred pending PDFontDescriptor setters and CMap/ToUnicode support.
Added CID system info wrapper for Registry/Ordering/Supplement.
Replaced font stubs with concrete PDModel font hierarchy, descendant descriptor fallback, and CID width handling for composite fonts.
Added PDFontDescriptor metric normalization, flag helpers, panose access, and descriptor dictionary accessors.
Added font factory dispatch based on PDF font subtype.
Added PANOSE classification wrapper.
Implemented simple-font width, glyph, and encoding-backed unicode fallback behavior, with constructor-level Type1 encoding injection support.
ToUnicodeFallback via TTF unicode cmap, width extraction using UPM-scaled TTF advance widths. Baseline extraction and layout scenarios covered.
Adapted stub – PDTrueTypeFont embedding deferred pending PDFontDescriptor setters.
Implemented composite Type0 font wiring with descendant descriptor and CID width delegation.
Issue #51: added Type0 /Encoding CMap integration (stream + predefined identity fallback), CodeToCID via Type0 CMap, and ToUnicode fallback chaining to UCS2/descendant mapping.
Implemented Type1 loading with embedded PFB/segment parsing, mapped system-font fallback loading, and embedded encoding precedence.
Adapted stub – PDType1Font embedding deferred pending PfbParser port and PDFontDescriptor setters.
Added canonical mapping for standard 14 PDF fonts with expanded upstream alias matrix compatibility names.
Mechanical port of Subsetter interface (renamed ISubsetter per .NET conventions).
Adapted stub – full font subsetting requires PDFontDescriptor setter APIs and document-writing layer, deferred.
Implemented dictionary encoding resolution and Differences overrides, including Symbol/ZapfDingbats Standard14 fallback routing.
Added PDModel encoding base class.
Added MacRoman encoding wrapper for PDModel fonts.
Added Symbol encoding map for PDModel fonts.
Added Type1 built-in encoding adapter from parsed Type1 fonts.
Added WinAnsi encoding map for PDModel fonts.
Added ZapfDingbats encoding map for PDModel fonts.
Replaced dash-pattern stub with immutable COS-backed line dash pattern model.
Added subtype-based XObject factory for form/transparency/image streams.
Mechanical port of PDCIEBasedColorSpace abstract base; toRGBImage/toRawImage imaging methods deferred (AWT not available).
Adapted port of PDCIEDictionaryBasedColorSpace; Java java.awt.color.ColorSpace.CS_CIEXYZ replaced with inline Bradford XYZ->sRGB matrix.
Mechanical port of PDDeviceColorSpace abstract base.
Mechanical port of PDDeviceNAttributes; COSDictionaryMap<String,PDSeparation> expressed as IDictionary.
Mechanical port of PDDeviceNProcess dictionary wrapper.
Mechanical port of PDGamma (three-float RGB gamma wrapper for tagged-PDF colours).
Adapted port of PDJPXColorSpace; java.awt.color.ColorSpace replaced with direct component-count/range parameters.
Adapted port of PDOutputIntent; java.awt.color.ICC_Profile replaced with raw stream byte copy (N component count not pre-parsed).
Mechanical port of PDSpecialColorSpace empty abstract base.
Mechanical port of PDTristimulus (three-float XYZ tristimulus wrapper).
Implemented form XObject content stream, resources, BBox, and matrix access.
Added transparency-group subtype over PDFormXObject.
Adapted stub – CCITT/TIFF imaging requires platform-specific APIs not yet available.
Adapted stub – custom raster factory requires platform-specific imaging APIs.
Adapted stub – JPEG image factory requires platform-specific imaging APIs.
Adapted stub – lossless image factory requires platform-specific imaging APIs.
PDImage.java mapped to existing adapted PDImage.cs abstract class.
Implemented basic image XObject decode and metadata access for DeviceRGB/Flate test path.
Adapted stub – PNG converter requires platform-specific imaging APIs.
Adapted stub – sampled image reader requires platform-specific imaging APIs.

Bottom-up merge sort port is present and covered by IterativeMergeSortTest.
First pdfbox utility leaf port used to seed the wider pdfbox conversion backlog.
Assembly metadata-backed version lookup preserves PDFBox null-on-error semantics and is covered by VersionTest.
XML parsing hardening and node-value helpers are covered by XMLUtilTest.
Prefix-tree helper now backs file-signature detection for the filetypedetector package.
File-type enum now closes the remaining util.filetypedetector package gap.
Magic-number detection now covers seekable streams and byte arrays with regression coverage in FileTypeDetectorTest.
Upstream COSDictionaryTest converted to xUnit.
Core COSObjectKey unit coverage is converted; fixture-driven PDFBOX-5742 integration scenario is deferred outside primitive/container scope.
Upstream PDFDocEncoding tests converted for deviation table and PDFBOX-3864 behavior.
Upstream TestCOSArray converted to xUnit for COSArray container parity checks.
Upstream TestCOSName converted with COS-layer adaptations for key encoding and escaped name serialization.
Upstream TestCOSStream converted with single/multi-filter encode/decode parity, close semantics, and hasData behavior checks.
Upstream TestCOSString converted with direct COSString writer assertions.
Upstream unmodifiable dictionary test coverage converted with DateTimeOffset date adaptation.
Filter roundtrip and factory lookup tests added for .NET port scope.
Adapted stream/file save-load test intent to deterministic fixture-based open->inspect->save checks with page-count and version assertions in this slice.
Adapted xUnit tests covering string fields, date roundtrip, trapped valid/invalid values, and custom metadata.
Adapted xUnit tests covering media box defaults, box accessors, rotation, structParents, and hasContents.
Adapted deterministic page tree tests cover index/count/remove scenarios; outline/multi-level malformed fixture scenarios remain deferred.
Mechanical test helper port for integer-backed name-tree nodes.
Mechanical xUnit v3 conversion of upstream name-tree tests plus value lookup coverage.
Mechanical xUnit v3 conversion of upstream number-tree tests.
Adapted function test coverage combining upstream Type 4 scenarios, parser cases, and Type 2 evaluation checks.
Mechanical xUnit helper port for Type 4 operator/parser tests.
Added .NET encryption baseline tests for AccessPermission, PDEncryption, and StandardSecurityHandler instantiation.

16 tests covering: role-map round-trip, standard-type resolution via role map, PDAttributeObject factory dispatch, PDDefaultAttributeObject get/set/names, PDUserAttributeObject add/remove/set user properties, PDUserProperty field access, PDStructureElement attribute CRUD and change notification, PDStructureTreeRoot ClassMap single/list/null round-trips.

29 issue-46 tests covering parent-tree set/get round-trip, single-element lookup, array-value lookup, missing-key guard, end-to-end catalog→StructTreeRoot→ParentTree traversal, multi-page stability, Layout/List/Table attribute object subtypes, and PDAttributeObject.Create factory dispatch.
Added CreateMinimalTrueTypeWithUpm(int) helper; CreateHeadTable now accepts unitsPerEm parameter.
Expanded font replacement tests for width arrays, ToUnicode CMap decoding, descriptor metrics, and Standard14 mapping.
Ported PDFBox date parsing/ISO8601 formatting utilities for DateTimeOffset-based XmpBox type support.
Adapted metadata port to add schema registration, typed schema create/get APIs, namespace-aware schema parsing, and RDF synthesis for schema-backed serialization.
Mechanical xmpbox constants port for RDF/xpacket defaults and core attribute names.
Adapted Adobe PDF schema class shell with preferred namespace/prefix constructors for typed registration parity.
Adapted Dublin Core schema class shell with preferred namespace/prefix constructors for typed registration parity.
Adapted Exif schema class shell with preferred namespace/prefix constructors for typed registration parity.

Adapted XMP page text schema class shell with preferred namespace/prefix constructors for typed registration parity.
Adapted XMP rights management schema class shell with preferred namespace/prefix constructors for typed registration parity.
Adapted base schema abstraction for namespace/prefix identity, rdf:about handling, and description-element persistence used by parser/serializer registration flows.
Adapted schema factory for namespace-to-schema instantiation with optional prefix override and metadata registration wiring.
Mechanical schema exception port with message/cause constructor parity.

Ported the abstract XMP field base with metadata/property-name/attribute support.
Ported the abstract simple-property base with namespace, prefix, raw-value, and string/value APIs.
